channel_subscription_required: To use the bot, join the channel and tap "Check subscription".
channel_subscription_check_failed: Couldn't verify the subscription. Please try again later or contact support.
channel_subscription_verified_success: ✅ Subscription confirmed! You're good to go.
webapp_auth_success: ✅ Login confirmed. Return to the Web App.
webapp_auth_expired: The login link has expired. Return to the Web App and try again.
main_menu_greeting:
Hi, {user_name}! 👋
Open "Personal Account" to set up the connection, view your subscription, or renew access.
no_subscription_options_available: Subscription issuance is not configured by the bot administrator
referral_no_bonuses_configured: Sorry, the referral program is currently disabled
bot_interface_menu_webapp_hint: The Personal Account is the easier place to manage the service.
error_occurred_try_again: An error occurred, please try again.
choose_payment_method_traffic: Choose how to pay for the traffic package:
yookassa_autopay_flow_prompt: Auto-renew is enabled. Choose how you'd like to pay:
yookassa_autopay_choose_saved_card: Choose a saved card to charge:
yookassa_autopay_no_saved_cards: No saved cards found. Pay with a new card or link one in Payment Methods.
yookassa_autopay_charge_initiated: Charge request sent to the selected card. We'll notify you once the payment completes.
my_devices_details:
📱 My Devices ({current_devices}/{max_devices}) {devices} You can disconnect a device by selecting it from the list below.
Note: If you disconnect a device, it will be automatically connected again when you use it next. Before deleting, make sure you have deleted the subscription from the application.
no_devices_details_found_message: 📱 My Devices You don't have any devices yet. You have {max_devices} devices available. You can connect them by clicking the "🔗 Connect" button in the subscription menu.
my_devices_feature_disabled: The My Devices section is currently unavailable.
payment_link_message: To pay for {months} mo. subscription, click the button below:
payment_link_message_traffic: To pay for a {traffic_gb} GB package, tap the button below:
payment_invoice_sent_message: Telegram has sent the invoice above. Complete the payment or pick another method below.
payment_invoice_sent_message_traffic: Invoice for {traffic_gb} GB sent above. Complete the payment or pick another method below.
payment_successful_error_details: ✅ Payment succeeded, but an error occurred displaying details. Your subscription is active. Contact support if anything is wrong.
payment_successful_full: ✅ Payment successful! Your {months}-month subscription is active until {end_date}. Connection key: {config_link} To connect, open the link and follow the instructions 👇
payment_successful_traffic_full: ✅ Payment successful! Your {traffic_gb} GB package is active. Validity: {end_date} Connection key: {config_link} To connect, open the link and follow the instructions 👇
payment_successful_with_referral_bonus_f: ✅ Payment successful! Your {months}-month subscription (base end date: {base_end_date}) has been extended by {bonus_days} bonus days for referral from {inviter_name} and is now active until {final_end_date}. Connection key: {config_link} To connect, open the link and follow the instructions 👇
payment_failed: ❌ Payment failed or was cancelled. Please try again or contact support.
promo_code_not_found: Promo code {code} not found, expired, or already used the maximum number of times.
promo_code_too_many_attempts: Too many failed promo code attempts. Please try again in {seconds} sec.
promo_code_already_used_by_user: You have already used promo code {code}.
promo_code_applied_success_full: ✅ Promo code applied successfully! Subscription active until {end_date}. Connection key: {config_link} To connect, open the link and follow the instructions 👇
error_applying_promo_bonus: Failed to apply promo bonus. Please try again later or contact support.
trial_already_had_subscription_or_trial: You have already used a free trial or had a paid subscription. Free trial is available only once for new users.
trial_activated_details_message: ✅ Trial activated! Your {days}-day trial is active until {end_date}. Connection key: {config_link} To connect, open the link and follow the instructions 👇
referral_welcome_bonus_applied:
🎁 You have received {days} bonus day(s) for registering via a referral link!
Your subscription is active until {end_date}.
referral_program_info_new: 🎁 Referral Program 📊 Your stats: 👥 Friends invited: {invited_count} 💳 Purchased subscription: {purchased_count} 🔗 Telegram link: {referral_link}{webapp_link_section} 💰 Invitation bonuses: {bonus_details} 📢 Share the link with friends and get bonuses!
referral_bonus_per_period: 🎁 For a friend's {months}-month subscription: ➢ You: {inviter_bonus_days} days ➢ Friend: {referee_bonus_days} days
referral_not_available_for_traffic: Referral bonuses are not available for traffic packages.
referral_bonus_inviter_notification_exte: 🎉 Congrats! Your friend {referee_name} paid for a subscription. You received {days} bonus days! Your subscription is now active until {new_end_date}.
referral_bonus_inviter_notification_new_: 🎉 Congrats! Your friend {referee_name} paid for a subscription. You received a {days}-day bonus subscription! It is active until {new_end_date}.
user_is_banned: 🚫 Your account is banned. Please contact support.
admin_broadcast_confirm_prompt_short: The message above will be sent. Confirm?
admin_broadcast_cancelled_nav_back: Broadcast cancelled. You are returned to the admin panel.
broadcast_queue_result:
🚀 Broadcast queued!
📤 Enqueued: {sent_count}
❌ Errors: {failed_count}

📊 Queue Status:
👥 User queue: {user_queue_size} messages
📢 Group queue: {group_queue_size} messages

ℹ️ Messages will be sent automatically within Telegram limits.
admin_promo_invalid_bonus_days: Bonus days must be a positive number.
admin_promo_invalid_max_activations: Max activations must be a positive number.
admin_promo_invalid_validity_days: Validity period (in days) must be a positive number.
admin_promo_created_success: ✅ Promo code {code} created successfully! Bonus: {bonus_days} days Max uses: {max_activations} Valid until: {valid_until_str}.
admin_promo_export_all_caption:
📄 Export of all promo codes
📊 Total: {count} promo codes
admin_promo_prompt_bonus_days: Enter the new number of bonus days:
admin_promo_prompt_max_activations: Enter the new maximum number of activations:
admin_promo_prompt_validity_days: Enter the new validity period in days (0 for indefinite):
admin_ban_user_prompt: Enter user ID, @username, or email to ban:
admin_unban_user_prompt: Enter user ID, @username, or email to unban:
admin_prompt_for_user_id_or_username_log: Enter user ID, @username, or email to view logs:
admin_log_user_not_found: User "{input}" not found in bot database.
admin_broadcast_invalid_html: ❌ Invalid HTML in message. Please send valid HTML (Telegram-supported tags) or remove tags.
error_displaying_logs_too_long: Error: logs too long to display in one message. Try viewing logs for a specific user.
subscription_72h_notification:
👋 Hi, {user_name}!

⏳ Your service subscription expires in 3 days — {end_date}.

Please renew it using the button below.
subscription_48h_notification:
👋 Hi, {user_name}!

⏳ Your service subscription expires in 2 days — {end_date}.

Please renew it using the button below.
subscription_24h_notification:
👋 Hi, {user_name}!

⏳ Your service subscription expires in 1 day — {end_date}.

Please renew it using the button below.
subscription_expired_notification:
👋 Hi, {user_name}!

⛔ Your service subscription expired on {end_date}.

Please renew it using the button below.
subscription_expired_yesterday_notificat:
👋 Hi, {user_name}!

⏳ Your service subscription expired yesterday ({end_date}).

Please renew it using the button below.
autorenew_48h_charge_tomorrow_notice:
🔔 Reminder

Tomorrow an automatic charge will occur to renew your subscription. If you don't want auto-renew, disable it using the button below.
autorenew_confirm_enable: 🔄 Enable auto-renew? An automatic charge will be attempted before your subscription ends.
autorenew_confirm_disable: 🛑 Disable auto-renew? No further automatic charges will occur.
admin_user_management_prompt:
👤 User Management

Enter user ID, @username, or email to search:
admin_user_delete_not_allowed: ❌ You are not permitted to delete users.
admin_user_delete_confirmation_prompt:
⚠️ You are about to delete user {user_id} completely.

Send the exact Telegram ID of this user to confirm.
Any other reply will cancel the operation.
admin_user_delete_state_missing: ⚠️ No active delete operation. Start again.
admin_user_delete_already_removed: ℹ️ The user is already removed.
admin_user_delete_panel_error: ❌ Failed to remove the user from the panel. Operation aborted.
admin_user_delete_success: ✅ User {user_id} was removed from the bot and the panel.
admin_user_delete_error: ❌ Unable to delete the user. Please try again later.
admin_user_trial_reset_success: ✅ Trial reset! User can activate trial again.
admin_user_add_subscription_prompt:
➕ Adding subscription days for user {user_id}

Enter number of days to add:
admin_user_invalid_days: ❌ Invalid number of days. Enter number from 1 to 3650.
admin_panel_user_creation_failed: ❌ Failed to create or link panel user for ID {user_id}. Manual intervention required.
admin_user_send_message_prompt:
✉️ Sending message to user {user_id}

Enter message text:
inline_user_stats_message: 👥 User Statistics 📊 Total: {total} 📈 Active today: {active_today} 💳 With paid subscription: {paid} 🆓 On trial period: {trial} 😴 Inactive: {inactive} 🚫 Banned: {banned} 🎁 Via referral program: {referral}
inline_financial_stats_message: 💰 Financial Statistics 📅 Today: {today:.2f} RUB ({today_count} payments) 📅 Week: {week:.2f} RUB 📅 Month: {month:.2f} RUB 🏆 All time: {all_time:.2f} RUB
inline_system_stats_message: 🖥 Panel Statistics 🟢 Online: {online} 📊 Active: {active} 🔴 Disabled: {disabled} ⏰ Expired: {expired} ⚠️ Limited: {limited} 👥 Total users: {total} 💾 RAM Usage: {memory:.1f}% 📊 Week traffic: {week_traffic} 📊 Month traffic: {month_traffic} 🔗 Active nodes: {active_nodes}/{total_nodes}
log_panel_sync: {status_emoji} Panel Synchronization 📊 Status: {status} 👥 Users processed: {users_processed} 📋 Subscriptions synced: {subs_synced} 🕐 Time: {timestamp} 📝 Details: {details}
admin_bulk_promo_step1_quantity: 📦 Bulk Promo Code Creation Step 1 of 4: Quantity Enter the number of promo codes to create (1-1000):

admin_bulk_promo_step4_validity: 📦 Bulk Promo Code Creation Step 4 of 4: Validity Period Quantity: {quantity} Bonus days: {bonus_days} Max activations: {max_activations} Choose the validity period for promo codes:
admin_bulk_promo_enter_validity_days: ⏰ Enter the number of validity days for promo codes (1-365):
admin_promo_step1_code: 🎟 Create Promo Code Step 1 of 4: Promo Code Enter promo code (3-30 characters, letters and numbers only):
admin_promo_step2_bonus_days: 🎟 Create Promo Code Step 2 of 4: Bonus Days Code: {code} Enter the number of bonus days (1-365):

admin_promo_step4_validity: 🎟 Create Promo Code Step 4 of 4: Validity Period Code: {code} Bonus days: {bonus_days} Max activations: {max_activations} Choose the validity period for the promo code:
admin_promo_code_already_exists: ❌ A promo code with this code already exists
admin_promo_enter_validity_days: ⏰ Enter the number of validity days for the promo code (1-365):
admin_promo_management_title: 🎟 Promo Code Management Select a promo code for detailed view:
admin_promo_no_activations: 📋 Activations of promo code: {code} ❌ No activations found
inline_referral_description: Share referral link to get bonuses
my_subscription_details: 🔐 My Subscription ⏰ Status: {status} 📅 Active until: {end_date} 📆 Days left: {days_left} 🔗 Configuration link: {config_link} 📊 Traffic ({traffic_period}): Limit: {traffic_limit} Used: {traffic_used}
my_traffic_details: 🔐 My Traffic ⏰ Status: {status} 📅 Valid until: {end_date} 🔗 Configuration link: {config_link} 📊 Traffic ({traffic_period}): Limit: {traffic_limit} Used: {traffic_used} Left: {traffic_left}

autorenew_enable_requires_card: Link a payment card in Payment Methods before enabling auto-renew.
subscription_not_active: You don't have an active subscription.

payment_service_unavailable_alert: Payment service is unavailable. Please try again later.
error_creating_payment_record: Error creating payment record. Please try again later.

admin_ads_empty: 📭 No ad campaigns. Click "Create" to add one.
admin_ads_create_start_param_prompt: Enter start link parameter (e.g., AEZA). Will be used as start=AEZA
admin_ads_invalid_source: ❌ Invalid source. Enter up to 64 characters.
admin_ads_invalid_cost: ❌ Invalid amount. Enter a non-negative number.
admin_ads_start_param_exists: ❌ A campaign with this start parameter already exists.
admin_ads_card: 📈 Campaign #{id} Source: {source} start={start_param} Cost: {cost} RUB Active: {active} 👥 Starts: {starts} 🆓 Trials: {trials} 💳 Payers: {payers} 💵 Revenue: {revenue} RUB
admin_ads_delete_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete campaign #{id}? This action is irreversible.
email_footer_auto: Sent automatically by {brand}. Please don't reply.
email_login_code_preheader: Your one-time code expires in {minutes} min.
email_login_code_intro: Use this 6-digit code to finish signing in to your subscription dashboard.
email_login_code_expiry_html: The code is valid for {minutes} min.
email_login_code_security: If you didn't request this code, you can ignore this email — your account stays safe.
email_login_code_magic_intro: Don't want to type the code? Sign in with this link.
email_login_code_magic_hint: The link is single-use and expires together with the code.
email_login_code_text_magic: Or sign in with this single-use link: {url}
email_account_merged_preheader: Your accounts were combined into one profile.
email_account_merged_intro: We merged your accounts into a single profile so you keep one subscription and one history of payments.
email_account_merged_note: Your subscription link is unchanged. The duplicate panel user was removed automatically.
email_payment_success_preheader: Thanks — your subscription has been activated.
email_payment_success_intro_subscription: Thanks! Your subscription has been extended by {months} month(s).
email_payment_success_intro_traffic: Thanks! We added {traffic_gb} GB of traffic to your account.
email_payment_success_footer_note: We'll remind you a few days before the subscription ends.
email_payment_success_text_subscription:
Payment received: {amount}.
Subscription extended by {months} month(s).
Active until: {end_date}.
email_payment_success_text_traffic:
Payment received: {amount}.
Traffic added: {traffic_gb} GB.
Active until: {end_date}.
email_subscription_expiring_intro_today: Your subscription is about to expire. Renew now to keep your connection active without interruption.
email_subscription_expiring_intro_tomorr: Your subscription expires tomorrow. Renew now to avoid losing access.
email_subscription_expiring_intro_days: A heads-up so you can renew in advance and avoid any interruption.
email_subscription_expiring_note: If you've already renewed or use auto-renewal, you can ignore this email.
wa_auth_telegram_timeout: Could not check Telegram availability. Try again later or sign in with email
wa_auth_enter_code_6digits: Enter the 6-digit code from the email
